description: Small offline pi-scraper eval corpus. Fixtures are synthetic and dev-only; live URL benchmarking should be deliberate and robots/politeness aware.

cases.goal: Verify fast/static extraction and readable fallback quality on a normal article.
Verify headings, code-ish text, navigation-noise filtering, and stable markdown output.
Verify metadata, product-like content, JSON-LD/data-island recovery, and image-removal behavior.
Verify richer article structure with figures, lists, code blocks, tables, and outbound references.
Verify sparse DOM detection and recovery from hydration/data-island payloads before browser escalation.
Verify block detection returns structured blocked/error signals rather than junk extraction.
Verify PDF routing boundary and text extraction behavior when supported.
Verify noise filtering plus recovery of useful H1/hero text, announcements, CTA links, and footer sitemap links.
Verify performance and signal preservation on a larger docs page with tables, code blocks, links, and a large JSON data island.
Verify sparse DOM detection and recovery performance on a larger hydration payload without browser escalation.
